# coolify_server_validate (Resource)

Triggers SSH connectivity validation on a Coolify server. Use as a dependency gate to ensure servers are reachable before deploying resources. Changing the `triggers` map forces re-validation.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Validate that a server is reachable before deploying applications.
resource "coolify_server_validate" "web" {
  server_uuid = coolify_server.web.uuid
}

# Force re-validation by changing the triggers map.
resource "coolify_server_validate" "web_periodic" {
  server_uuid = coolify_server.web.uuid
  triggers = {
    run = timestamp()
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_uuid` (String) The UUID of the server to validate.

### Optional

- `triggers` (Map of String) An arbitrary map of values that, when changed, forces re-validation.

### Read-Only

- `message` (String) Validation result message from Coolify.
- `valid` (Boolean) Whether the server passed validation.
